description: Legal document in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe ha-Levi (1100–38 CE). Dated: 1443 Seleucid = 1131/32 CE. Probably a summary/digest. Describing a settlement between Hiba b. [...] and Sason b. Yefet. Also involves [...] b. Ḥalfon, and Abū l-Surūr who is acting as guarantor for Sason. Refers to hosting somebody as a guest; a sum of 7 dinars; maintenance for a widow. There are additional notes or jottings on verso mentioning [...] al-Sharābī. AA. ASE.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
